goldpy documentation

goldpy is a small CLI for checking Swissquote precious metal quotes from the terminal.

Contents

  • Usage
    • Install dependencies
    • Install the CLI
    • CLI examples
    • Selection modes
    • Build the docs
  • Examples
    • Run from the repository with uv
    • Run without installing permanently via uvx
    • Install as a tool with uv
    • Install with pipx
    • JSON output
    • Different pair
    • Tightest quote
    • Inspect available options
    • Filter by platform and spread profile
  • Quote selection
    • The raw input
    • Aggregate mode
    • Tightest mode
    • Filtering
    • Why both modes exist
  • API reference
    • goldpy
    • goldpy.client
    • goldpy.models
    • goldpy.service
    • goldpy.cli
  • Read the Docs
    • Expected setup
    • Local parity

What this documentation covers

  • How to install and run the CLI

  • How quote selection works

  • What Python modules make up the package

Quick start

uv sync --group dev --group docs
uv run --group docs sphinx-build -b html docs docs/_build/html
